sys_script_client.description: v2.7 STRY0105845 - DIA- Draft Scheduled Tasks- Create Draft Task State STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal DFCT0010476 - "Acknowledgement Prompt" does not have an "Acknowledge" button so users cannot use Tasker 2.7.0 | 2021-08-29 | mmcc | STRY0107404 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal 2.7.0 | 2021-09-03 | mmcc | DFCT0010476 - "Acknowledgement Prompt" does not have an "Acknowledge" button so users cannot use Tasker 2.7.0 | 2021-10-8 | mmcc | STRY0109110 - Draft Scheduled Tasks – UI – Delete Modal- Add Descendant tasks count
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - sverb_delete
